name: prisma-select-for-update
description: Prisma v7 extension for SELECT ... FOR UPDATE row locking

scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run build
scripts.db:setup: npm run db:up && sleep 2 && npm run db:push
scripts.release:patch: npm run changelog && git add CHANGELOG.md && git commit -m "chore: update changelog" && npm version patch && git push --follow-tags && npm run build && npm publish
scripts.release:minor: npm run changelog && git add CHANGELOG.md && git commit -m "chore: update changelog" && npm version minor && git push --follow-tags && npm run build && npm publish
scripts.release:major: npm run changelog && git add CHANGELOG.md && git commit -m "chore: update changelog" && npm version major && git push --follow-tags && npm run build && npm publish

author: mosaic-sunrise
